pr.title: Record: Int6 + 3x MLP + sliding window (val_bpb=1.1708) + 9 ablations

output.summary: Combines int6 per-row quantization with zstd compression and a 3×MLP expansion plus sliding-window eval, backed by ablations on shared hardware.
techniques: Int6 per-row quantization with zstd-22 compression to free artifact budget
3×MLP expansion (hidden=1536) with FP16 tied embeddings for added capacity
Sliding-window eval (stride=64) alongside nine controlled ablations
